metadata.description: jc-cli skills for Claude Code — conversational JumpCloud administration via the jc CLI, no direct API calls.

plugins.name: jc-cli-skills
plugins.description: Conversational skills for JumpCloud administration via the jc CLI — onboarding, offboarding, auth troubleshooting, security audit, compliance check, and recipe authoring. Built on top of the jc binary; install jc separately from https://github.com/TheJumpCloud/jc-cli.
